name: MSI PRO B860M-VC WIFI6E Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - Support DDR5-8800+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - Thunderbolt4 USB-C (DP 2.1 Alt mode) - Realtek 5G LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3 (B860MVCWIFI6E)
shortName: MSI PRO B860M-VC WIFI6E Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x
description: MSI micro-ATX motherboard for LGA 1851 socket with DDR5 support and Wi-Fi 6E with Thunderbolt 4.
